ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "ship_mode" TEXT /* Mode of shipping (e.g., Second Class, Standard Class) */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal, Bank Transfer) */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_ship_mode FOREIGN KEY ("ship_mode") REFERENCES shipping ("shipping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "segment" TEXT /* Segment of the customer (e.g., Consumer, Corporate) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount the customer has spent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_segment FOREIGN KEY ("segment") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category" INTEGER /* Category of the product (e.g., Furniture, Office Supplies) */,
  "sub_category" INTEGER /* Sub-category of the product (e.g., Bookcases, Chairs, Labels) */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* ID of the supplier */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., 10x20x30) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_sub_category FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category") REFERENCES product_sub_categories ("sub_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order that this item belongs to */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "sales" REAL /* Sales total for this item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being sold */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to this item */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit from this item */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product in the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the item */,
  "is_gift" INTEGER /* Whether the item is a gift */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Return status of the item (e.g., Not Returned, Returned, Processing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales summary */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sales data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the sales data */,
  "sales_total" REAL /* Total sales for the month */,
  "profit_total" REAL /* Total profit for the month */,
  "total_units_sold" INTEGER /* Total number of units sold in the month */,
  "average_sale" REAL /* Average sale amount for the month */,
  "total_discounts" REAL /* Total discounts applied in the month */,
  "total_shipping_costs" REAL /* Total shipping costs for the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping mode */,
  "shipping_mode" TEXT /* Name of the shipping mode (e.g., Second Class, Standard Class) */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping for this mode */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" INTEGER /* Estimated delivery time in days */,
  "is_insured" INTEGER /* Whether the shipping is insured */,
  "insurance_cost" REAL /* Cost of insurance for the shipping mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category that this sub-category belongs to */,
  "sub_category_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sub-category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment (e.g., Consumer, Corporate) */,
  "segment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)
